tagline: Agent mode is generally available: Agent mode in Genie Spaces is now generally available.
what_it_does: Agent mode is generally available: Agent mode in Genie Spaces is now generally available. Agent mode uses multi step reasoning to answer complex, exploratory questions with a report that includes citations, visualizations, and supporting tables. Retrieve visualization results using the API (Beta): You can now retrieve visualization results from Genie Spaces using the API.
why_it_matters: A subset of the data from uploaded files is sent to the external model and used to improve the response quality and properly parse the files.
plain_summary: Agent mode is generally available: Agent mode in Genie Spaces is now generally available. Agent mode uses multi step reasoning to answer complex, exploratory questions with a report that includes citations, visualizations, and supporting tables.

capabilities.desc: Partner-Powered AI features must be enabled. See Partner-powered AI features.

capabilities.title: PDF uploads are not supported
capabilities.desc: PDF uploads are not supported in compliance security profile workspaces. At least CAN RUN permissions on the Genie Agent. See…
